official_functions.role: Construct the official Login serverbound key packet fixture from official codec input
Write the official Login serverbound key body
Write the full Login serverbound framed key packet
Dispatch and decode the full Login serverbound framed key packet
Name the packet id assigned in Login serverbound state

official_functions.function_or_member: private ServerboundKeyPacket(FriendlyByteBuf), private write(FriendlyByteBuf), keybytes, encryptedChallenge
official_functions.role: Identify official key payload field order and decoded byte arrays

invariants: The official Login serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the key body.
The official Login serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ServerboundKeyPacket.
The decoded official ServerboundKeyPacket preserves keybytes and encryptedChallenge byte arrays from the fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded packet type, decoded fields, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove encryption success, private-key validation, authentication success, login acknowledgement, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer encryption success, private-key validation, authentication success, login acknowledgement, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
